metadata.description: Skills for AI-driven development: deep review, task decomposition, LT outline builder, context briefing, ADR capture, content seed, and deep research

plugins.name: claude-skills
plugins.description: Deep review (multi-perspective gap analysis), task decomposition (structured issue creation), LT outline builder (interactive presentation outline creation), context briefing (project-aware tech trend impact analysis), ADR capture (architecture decision record via conversational walkthrough), content seed (extract publishable content from engineering decisions), and deep research (evidence-based exploratory research with iterative deepening and scenario analysis) skills
